name: Countdown Casserole
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Frozen Vegetable Combination (broccoli, corn, and red pepper)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Spoon cheese spread into an 8x12 baking dish and place in the oven just until cheese melts (about 5 minutes).
3. Using a fork, stir milk into melted cheese until well blended.
4. Stir in beef, vegetables, potatoes, half of the French fried onions, seasoned salt, and black pepper.
5. Cover and bake at 375°F for 30 minutes or until heated through.
6. Top with shredded Cheddar Cheese and sprinkle remaining onions down the center.
7. Bake uncovered for an additional 3 minutes or until onions are golden brown.
